response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but the role requires a C++ specialist with 8-12 years of hands-on C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis. No evidence of industrial automation, SDL/IEC 62443, MQTT, or relevant protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850).
strengths: Long engineering tenure with architecture and full-stack delivery experience
Strong testing/TDD discipline and mentoring/teaching track record
Some C/C++ background at National Instruments plus low-level systems work in DLang
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; primary stack is JS/TS and DLang
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, or SDL background
Missing required protocol/IoT expertise (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, message brokers)

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Broad senior engineering and architecture experience
